summary: Layer 0 corpus for ClaudeMyNetworkEngineer. v0.1 starter bundle: authored summaries covering high-leverage RED + AMBER cases, plus foundational framing. Canonical source documents (NIST/RFC/CIS) are referenced by URL in v0.1; full bundling per docs/corpus_curation.md grows in subsequent releases.

authored.description: Original summaries distilling canonical guidance with explicit URL pointers to authoritative sources.

nist.description: NIST publications. Bundled as full text in subsequent releases; v0.1 references by URL only.

ietf.description: IETF RFCs. Bundled as full text in subsequent releases; v0.1 references by URL only.

cis.constraint: NonCommercial — project distribution must remain non-commercial to bundle CIS content. See README §Corpus and licensing.
cis.description: CIS Controls v8 + selected Benchmarks. Bundled as full text in subsequent releases; v0.1 references by URL only.

growth_plan: Top 15-20 highest-leverage cases per docs/corpus_curation.md §8 sign-off (b). Subsequent additions arrive as the project encounters real operator situations that warrant new summaries.
